summary: Expand 'auth setup' with explicit sandbox-no-approval steps, the exact https://localhost:8085/callback redirect URI, scope list, and a Sign-in-with-Google note; point --launch at /applications/new.
reason: Default 'auth setup' was a one-line 'see docs'. New users need the exact registration steps; Wahoo requires an https redirect URI and a registered sandbox app works with no approval for one's own account.
